headline: Why Citizens Remains Bullish On ServiceNow, Inc. (NOW)
summary: ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is among the 5 Tech Stocks with Best Earnings Growth in 2026. On March 6, Citizens reaffirmed a Market Outperform rating and a price target of $260 on ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW), highlighting the company’s footing for the agentic era. This is achieved through the company’s customer relationships, architecture, and AI Control Tower […]

headline: Novaworks AI HR Platform Expands ServiceNow Total Workforce Narrative
summary: Novaworks has launched an AI native Human Capital Management operating system on the ServiceNow platform. The company has raised an US$8m seed round, with participation from ServiceNow Ventures. The new platform focuses on Total Workforce Management and uses agentic AI directly within ServiceNow. The Novaworks launch adds a fresh angle to the ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) story by bringing AI driven Human Capital Management directly onto the core platform. For readers tracking enterprise software,...

headline: MongoDB vs. ServiceNow: Which AI Software Stock Has Greater Upside?
summary: MDB and NOW ride the booming enterprise AI demand, but diverge on growth visibility, monetization pace and near-term outlook dynamics.

headline: Novaworks.ai Launches Agentic Operating System for Total Workforce Management, Raises $8M Seed Round
summary: Today, Novaworks, the AI-native Human Capital Management (HCM) operating system for the enterprise built on the ServiceNow platform, announced its launch in conjunction with $8M in seed funding led by Stalwart Ventures, with strategic participation from ServiceNow Ventures and Bell Ventures. The Company also introduced the first agentic operating system for Total Workforce Management (TWM), designed to enable enterprise organizations to modernize HR.

The Company also introduced the first agentic operating system for Total Workforce Management (TWM), designed to enable enterprise organizations to modernize HR.

headline: NowVertical Expands Cloud Migration Engagement Following AI-Powered Delivery Acceleration
summary: TORONTO, March 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NowVertical Group Inc. (TSXV: NOW) (“NowVertical” or the “Company”), a data and AI solutions and services provider, today announced the expansion of an existing cloud data migration engagement with a large enterprise client. The expansion follows the use of NowVertical’s proprietary AI-powered migration tools, which was deployed during the initial phase of the engagement to automate elements of the data migration process.
